meta.title: FLUX 1.1 Pro AI Image Generator | Text to Image | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create stunning images with FLUX 1.1 Pro by Black Forest Labs. State-of-the-art text-to-image generation with blazing speed, excellent prompt following, and exceptional image diversity. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Black Forest Labs' flagship image generation model. FLUX 1.1 Pro delivers state-of-the-art performance with blazing speed, top-tier prompt following, exceptional visual quality, and remarkable output diversity.

features.title: Key Features

speed.title: Blazing Fast Generation
speed.description: Generate high-quality images in seconds. FLUX 1.1 Pro is optimized for speed without compromising on quality.

promptFollowing.title: Superior Prompt Following
promptFollowing.description: Exceptional understanding of complex prompts. Get exactly what you describe with high fidelity to your instructions.

quality.title: Exceptional Visual Quality
quality.description: State-of-the-art image quality with stunning details, accurate colors, and professional-grade output.

diversity.title: Output Diversity
diversity.description: Generate diverse variations from the same prompt. Explore different interpretations and styles effortlessly.

photorealism.title: Photorealistic Results
photorealism.description: Create hyper-realistic images that rival professional photography. Perfect for product shots and portraits.

hands.title: Accurate Human Anatomy
hands.description: Improved generation of human hands and anatomy compared to previous models. More consistent and natural results.

0.question: What is FLUX 1.1 Pro and who developed it?
0.answer: FLUX 1.1 Pro is Black Forest Labs' flagship text-to-image model. It's developed by former Stability AI employees and is based on a 12 billion parameter rectified flow transformer architecture.

1.question: What makes FLUX 1.1 Pro different from other image models?
1.answer: FLUX 1.1 Pro offers state-of-the-art performance with blazing speed, exceptional prompt following, and remarkable output diversity. It excels at photorealism and generates more consistent human anatomy.

2.question: How fast is FLUX 1.1 Pro?
2.answer: FLUX 1.1 Pro is one of the fastest high-quality image generators available. It can generate detailed images in just seconds while maintaining exceptional quality.

3.question: What are Ultra and Raw modes?
3.answer: Ultra mode generates images at up to 4 megapixels (4x higher resolution) without affecting speed. Raw mode creates hyper-realistic images in the style of candid photography.

4.question: What types of images can I create?
4.answer: You can create portraits, product shots, landscapes, concept art, architectural visualizations, artistic styles, and more. FLUX 1.1 Pro supports diverse styles from photorealistic to artistic.

5.question: How does FLUX 1.1 Pro handle human anatomy?
5.answer: FLUX 1.1 Pro has significantly improved human anatomy generation, especially hands. It produces more consistent and natural-looking human features compared to previous generation models.
